result.finding: validation/longchain_mechanism.py: the single-pool lipid term TRADES OFF root for long chains -- PFUnDA root 20.6->3.9 (obs 19.5), PFDoDA root 159->4.4 (obs 69); and PFDoDA shoot is STILL ~3-4x under (straw 14.7 vs 49.8). A clean cost-free fix is refuted: it needs a 2-pool (free + bound) split and a residual long-chain mechanism.
